title: Eldermere Trading
author: Reegs27
selftext:
EDGE VISION

AI Trade Intelligence Engine

Upload a chart.
Get the edge.

Edge Vision transforms any TradingView screenshot into a complete institutional-grade trade analysis in seconds.

Powered by advanced AI and real-time market intelligence, Edge Vision reads price structure, liquidity, macro conditions, COT positioning, sentiment, and seasonal flows to uncover only the highest probability setups.

Every analysis delivers:

* Precision entry zones
* Smart stop losses
* High-conviction targets
* Risk-to-reward ratios
* Full market rationale
* TAKE / WAIT / SKIP decisioning

Because not every setup deserves a trade.

Edge Vision is designed to remove emotion, eliminate guesswork, and help traders focus only on opportunities with real confluence and asymmetric risk.

Whether you trade forex, indices, crypto, or commodities, Edge Vision combines technical structure with institutional data to give you the clarity professionals rely on.

Why Traders Use Edge Vision

✔ AI-powered chart analysis
✔ Institutional-grade market intelligence
✔ Macro + COT + liquidity integration
✔ Real-time setup evaluation
✔ Risk-aware trade planning
✔ High-conviction opportunities only

Trade Smarter. Execute With Conviction.

Edge Vision doesn’t chase trades.
It finds the ones worth taking.
